titleStmt.title: SII 41.280: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 280. (A.R. No. 497 of 1905.) Tiruvālaṅgāḍu, Tiruttani Taluk, Chittoor District. On the west wall of the Bhramaralakamba shrine in the Vataranyesvara temple at Tiruvalangadu.

p.hi: Vijayanagara. Tirumalaiyadeva-Maharaya, Saka 1493, Prajapati, Makara, Purva 7, Monday, Asuvati = 1572, January 21.

summary.p: This is a record of poliyūṭṭu agreement deed given by the trustees of the Tiruvālaṅgāḍu temple given to the Head of the Uḷmaḍam (maṭha), Immaḍi-Dharma-Śivāchārya who gave a sum of 1000 pon to the temple. The money was used for digging a tank and its channels and the additional income (atikalakkam) was used for various expenses in connection with some service instituted in the name of the donor according to the stipulations of the grant. It was also agreed to give one fourth of the prasādam to the maṭha. The donor came in the lineage of the Śaiva teacher Anantaśivāchārya and his pupil Ponnambala-Dharmaśivāchārya.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
vināyakan tiruvuḷḷam Āva bhamastu svastiśrīmaṉ makāmaṇṭalecura rācātirācarācaparamecura pūṟuvatekṣaṇa paccima Uttara camuttirātipati śrīvirappiṟutāpa tirumalaiy tevamakārāyar piṟitivirācciyam paṇṇiyaruḷāniṉṟa cakāttam 1000 4 100 9 10 3 mel cellāniṉṟa piṟacoṟpati caṅvaccarattu makaraṉāyiṟṟu pūṟuvapakṣattu cattamiyum comavāramum Acuvatinakṣattiramum peṟṟa yiṟṟai nāḷ ceyaṅkoṇṭa coḻamaṇṭalattu vaṭakarai maṇavil koṭṭattu paḻaiya
ṉūrṉāṭṭil paḻaiyaṉūr tiruvālaṅkāṭuṭaināyiṉārkoyil Āticaṇṭecurar Aruḷāl śrīkāriyam ceyvārum tāṉattārum yimmaṇṭalattu yikkoṭṭattu yiṉṉāṭṭil Uṭaiyār tiruvālaṅkāṭuṭaiya nayiṉār koyil Uḷmaṭamuñ cikecamakāmuṉi Ākiṉamāṉa śrīmāveṭāṭalicuracaraṇāravinta tiyāṉa pārāyaṇarāṉa patamvākkiyappiṟamāṇa pārāvārapāriṇarāṉa śrīmāvetamāṟkapiṟatiṣṭhāpakācāriyarāṉa vetāntācāriyarāṉa Aṉantacivācāriyar piriya ciṣyarāṉa pon
ṉampala taṉmacivācāriyaciṣyarāṉa yimmaṭa taṉmacivācāriyar Ayyaṉ Avarkaḷukku poliyūṭṭu taṉmacāsaṉam paṇṇikkuṭuttapaṭi tevamaṇṭalaticammāṉa ṭaiyūril taṉma civacamuttiram navamāka Erikaṭṭivittatukkum Āṟu kālukaḷ Ayapaṭiyaḷturavukaḷ kaṭṭivittatukkum ceṉṟa poṉ 1000 yinta Āyiram poṉ ceṉṟu paṇṇi payir Eṟi pūṟuvalakkam niṅkalāka Atikalakkam kaṇṭuvarukaiyil viṟtikku cilavāka Uṭaiyār tiruvālaṅkāṭuṭaiya nayiṉāṟkum ṉācciyārva
ṇṭārkuḻal ṉācciyāṟkum taṅkaḷ Upayamāka kālacantikkupiṟaku Uccikkālattukku muṉṉāka taṉma civvācāriyar Ayyaṉ cantikaṭṭaḷai yiṭukayil cāttukāppu Eṇṇai teṅkāyika paḻam 2 10 cakkarai palam 1 teṉØ Amutupaṭi tyava payaṟu§ neyin=ta taṅkaḷ Upayamāka vacantamaṇṭapamum kaṭṭivittu vicuvaṉātaṉaiyum vicālākṣi Ammaṉaiyum Eḻuntaruḷappaṇṇukayil ṉāḷ 1kku Ø mūṉṟumā tiruviḷakku Eṇṇai Iraṇṭumā Āka canti Oṉṟukku Ø 1000 4 100 Eṇṇai ney teṅkāy paḻam cakkarai tenkaṟikāyimel veccatukkum
ṉāḷ 1 kku 1(1/4) yintappaṇam Oṉṟekālum Amutupaṭi Eḻukuṟuṇiyum ṉāḷtoṟum naṭattivarakkaṭavomākavum Amutuceytaruḷiṉa piṟacātam taṉmakaṟtā tanmacivācāriyar Ayyaṉ maṭattukku ṉālil Oṉṟu naṭattikkaṭavomākavum toppu tiruṉāḷ kāttikai māsam cotinakṣattirattile naṭattivara kaṭavomākavum yinta poliyūṭṭu cantirātittavaraiyum naṭattivarakkaṭavomākavum yinta taṉmattukku yātoruttar Akitam paṇṇinavan keṅkai karaiyile kārāmpacuvatai paṇṇiṉa toṣattile
poka kaṭavaṉākavum yikkoyil tāṉattār yivai kūḻāṇṭār Eḻuttu yivai kūḻāṇṭār Eḻuttu yivai tāṉattār Eḻuttu yivaitāṉattār Eḻuttu koyil kaṇakku Ammaiyappaveḷāṉ Uttiraṉperuṭaiyaṉ Atiravici Eḻuttu koyil kaṇakku Ammaiappaveḷāṉ perumputūruṭaiyār ciṉṉappettayaṉ Eḻuttu śrī māheśvara rakṣai §
Digital edition of SII 41.280 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
